name: Enterprise Methodology Navigation Rail Polish
scope: Methodology navigation rail and styling only

scrollbar_removal_details.rail_overflow_behavior: The rail remains horizontally scrollable while the visible native white scrollbar is hidden.

auto_scroll_behavior.method: requestAnimationFrame when available, with recursive setTimeout fallback for runtimes without requestAnimationFrame
auto_scroll_behavior.motion: Slow left-to-right scroll that reverses near the end and repeats

accessibility_notes.keyboard_activation: Native button behavior supports Tab focus and Enter/Space activation.
accessibility_notes.focus_state: Visible focus ring uses gold highlight with dark offset.

visual_qa_result.auto_scroll_verification_note: Browser automation became unstable after repeated local dev restarts. Code was updated after diagnostics showed this browser runtime lacked requestAnimationFrame and window.setInterval; the final implementation now includes a setTimeout fallback, but browser-level motion verification could not be completed before the Browser MCP timed out.
visual_qa_result.dev_runtime_note: After npm run build -- --webpack, npm run dev:cfs started backend successfully but Next dev served / as 404 from the generated dev cache. The generated .next cache was not cleared because this phase did not explicitly request runtime cache cleanup.

model_safety_verification.raw_model_terms_in_source: Only aggregate ranking distribution keys and safety status text remain in Methodology code; they are not parcel-level outputs.

validation_results.backend_validation: not run; backend files were not changed

runtime_results.frontend_status: 404 after webpack build when served by Next dev/Turbopack
runtime_results.frontend_status_note: Source and production build are valid; local dev smoke is blocked by generated Next dev cache state. Cache cleanup was intentionally not performed in this phase.

smoke_test_results.methodology_loads: verified before final timer fallback; final browser recheck blocked by dev/browser runtime instability
smoke_test_results.rail_auto_scrolls_gently: implemented but final browser verification blocked
smoke_test_results.rail_pauses_on_hover_focus: implemented but final browser verification blocked
smoke_test_results.overview_due_diligence_executive_print: not rechecked after final timer fallback because frontend dev runtime returned 404

remaining_known_limitations: Final browser motion verification is pending a clean local Next dev cache/session.
The post-build Turbopack dev server served the not-found route for /; clearing generated .next cache may be required as a separate explicit runtime cleanup task.
No backend files, schemas, datasets, model artifacts, or public prediction endpoints were changed.
